programs.title: The Sympathizer
programs.desc: A communist party mole, the captain juggles the demands of his South Vietnam Army boss, the general, and his CIA handler, Claude; with the fall of Saigon imminent, the captain must round up a list of evacuees for a flight to the U.S.

programs.title: The Sympathizer
programs.desc: The Captain and his fellow Vietnamese refugees attempt to settle into life in Los Angeles; the defeated General grows suspicious and demands the Captain locate a mole he believes has infiltrated their ranks; as the Captain narrows in on a target, he reconnects with his former teacher, Professor Hammer, and meets his beguiling assistant, Ms. Mori.

programs.title: The Sympathizer
programs.desc: With the General's order to eliminate the spy in their ranks weighing on him, the Captain seeks Bon's help to craft and execute a plan timed for Independence Day; at an upscale lunch, Claude introduces the Captain to the Auteur.

programs.title: The Sympathizer
programs.desc: The Captain, a North Vietnamese spy, navigates the challenges of living a double life as he begins to symphatize with a community of South Vietnamese refugees in the US.

programs.title: The Sympathizer
programs.desc: After a lengthy hospital stay, the Captain finds his life in disarray; Lana is working a new gig away from her parents; Ms. Mori is romantically involved with a familiar face; the General has concocted a plan to reclaim his homeland.

programs.title: The Sympathizer
programs.desc: Convinced that the General's plan is doomed to fail, the captain's mission is to trace the General's funding, his desperation grows as he searches for ways to expose the military operation and to achieve his ultimate goal, to save Bon.
